title: Director of Early Childhood Education
notes: Early Childhood Dept at 4400 W 18th St; dept email EarlyChildhood@houstonisd.org. Pre-K full-day. HB 1605-aligned PreK; expanding Pre-K access. Executive Director C&I Nalsy Perez (nperez@houstonisd.org) oversees PreK at division level. Email for Castruita not published; format firstinitial+lastname@houstonisd.org likely (mcastrui@houstonisd.org pattern unconfirmed).

title: Bilingual/ESL & Early Childhood contact
notes: Full-day Pre-K/Head Start; dual language on every campus including HS PK. TEA appointed new Board of Managers and Superintendent in 2025 (leadership transition). Early Childhood/Head Start routed through Bilingual/ESL Dept; Adame is published contact. Executive Director of C&I position exists but name not on public page.

title: Instructional Officer for Pre-Kindergarten
notes: Pre-K Journey program launching; dept email prekindergarten@katyisd.org. Heather DeVries is Director of Interventions (PreK rolls up to her). Meredith Smith is Instructional Officer for Pre-K Curriculum. Email format firstname.lastname@katyisd.org (jennifer.ina@katyisd.org likely). HB 3 full-day Pre-K.

title: Senior Director of Elementary Teaching & Learning
notes: Lawson Early Childhood School is dedicated PreK center (Principal Susie Towber). Dr. Amber Epperson Asst Supt of T&L. Amy Plate is Director of Childcare Programs (separate from PreK academic). Email format first initial + last name @mckinneyisd.net common; jmcgowan@mckinneyisd.net likely.

title: Director of Early Childhood Programs
notes: PreK at three dedicated early childhood schools (Clifton, Kinkeade, Pierce). Email format firstname.lastname@irvingisd.net standard (carina.compean@irvingisd.net likely). HB 3 full-day PreK. Heavy bilingual/dual-language enrollment.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Academics & Assessment
notes: No dedicated Early Childhood director; curriculum routed through Asst Supt. TEKS Resource System for K-12 curriculum. Note website is hosted on esc18 portal but is the district site (not the ESC itself). Scott joined May 2022. Email likely dscott@bsisd.esc18.net (pattern unconfirmed).

title: C&I Director (Pre-K oversight)
notes: Early Excellence Academy is new Pre-K center (opened Aug 2023); Principal Claire Compton (replaced Jessica Perez 2025). HQPK program. Dr. Paloma Moreno is Director of Multilingual Programs (PK bilingual). High-growth Houston-area district.

title: Superintendent
notes: El Paso area district; free full-day PreK for all 4yo, half-day for qualifying 3yo. Head Start runs through ESC Region 19 (esc19hs.net) - Socorro Rodriguez directs ESC19 Head Start (external to district). Elementary Education dept exists but director name not on public page. Vasquez signed 3yr contract Aug 2025. Email format first initial + last name @sisd.net likely (jvasquez@sisd.net).

title: Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Corpus Christi area. Kenna Moody is Assistant Director of C&I (kmoody@tmisd.us). Small/mid district with single C&I director covering PreK-12.

title: Associate Superintendent of Instruction (Acting Superintendent)
notes: Has dedicated Early Childhood Learning Center. Lisa Cavazos is Director of Strategic Partnerships & Student Outreach for ECLC PreK (elizabeth.cavazos@mcallenisd.net, 956-687-6473). Superintendent transition - De Hoyos named acting; previously Rene Gutierrez. PreK in Spanish-English dual language.

title: Executive Director of Early Learning
notes: TEA appointed Board of Managers and new Superintendent (Marcey Sorensen) Feb 2024 - major leadership transition. Adopted new 2024-25 PreK curriculum (Creative Curriculum by Teaching Strategies - HB 1605 aligned). New two-way dual language PreK 2024-25. Email format firstname.lastname@lajoyaisd.com likely.

title: Early Childhood Coordinator / Head Start Director
notes: PreK at all elementary campuses. Head Start 3yo at Alderson, Carmona-Harrison, Ervin, and Hodges Elementary. Curriculum vertically aligned to TX Kinder standards. Office at 1628 19th Street East Building, Office 204.

title: Director of Early Childhood Education
notes: Launched Little Learners Academy Program (employee childcare + PreK expansion) ~ 2025. Currently half-day PreK with several community partner sites. Email format firstname.lastname@amaisd.org likely (brittany.hinz@amaisd.org). HB 3 PreK; potential expansion signal.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Located in Administration Building 4th Floor. Expanding tuition-based Pre-K (LEAP Employee Pre-K signal). Specialists Katie Fink and Linda Garza on the team. Strong PreK expansion buying signal.

title: Chief Academic Officer
notes: Dr. Ward named CAO May 2025 (NEW LEADERSHIP TRANSITION). Replaced Head Start with districtwide full-day Pre-K (2019). Superintendent Dr. Marty Crawford. Email format firstname.lastname@tylerisd.org likely (johnita.ward@tylerisd.org).

title: Executive Director of Curriculum, Instruction & Assessment
notes: ACTUAL DISTRICT WEBSITE IS chapelhillisd.org NOT chisddevils.com (chisddevils.com appears to be athletics-only). Located Tyler, TX (Smith County). Superintendent named Region 7 Superintendent of the Year 2025. Email format firstname.lastname@chapelhillisd.org likely (josh.tremont@chapelhillisd.org).

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum & Learning
notes: LEADERSHIP TRANSITION - Gusyakov named lone finalist for Diboll ISD Superintendent (March 2025/26). All-day Pre-K since 2019-20. Email format likely firstname.lastname@lumbertonisd.org. May be in transition by outreach time.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Accountability
notes: Small district near Temple, TX. Uses TEKS Resource System for K-12 curriculum. Email format likely firstname.lastname@troyisd.org or dbecker@troyisd.org.

title: Early Learning Center Coordinator
notes: Has dedicated GISD Early Learning Center. PreK at Williams, Village, Frost Elementary. Department email earlylearningcenter@georgetownisd.org. Email format firstname.lastname@georgetownisd.org likely (elisabeth.thomison@georgetownisd.org).

title: Deputy Superintendent and Chief Academic Officer
notes: Mary Noble is Deputy Academic Officer Area 1, Dr. Michael Watson is Deputy Academic Officer Area 2 (PreK rolls to these). PreK registration email PreKRegistration@hayscisd.net. Debbie Brown is Director of Academic Support. High-growth Austin-area district.

title: Executive Director of Elementary Education
notes: SCUC ISD - position exists on org chart (Executive Director of Elementary Education) but specific name not surfaced on public pages. Email format firstname.lastname@scucisd.org. San Antonio metro suburban district. Recommend Apollo enrichment for name.

title: Director of Early Childhood Department
notes: TURNOVER - Previous director Diana Wagner left for Floresville ISD. San Antonio metro district. Dedicated Early Childhood Department under C&I. Bilingual/dual language PreK program. Pre-K 4 SA grant partnership history. Recommend Apollo enrichment for current director name.

title: Superintendent
notes: OPEN POSITION - District is hiring Executive Director of Curriculum and Instruction (posted Mar 2026). Alexandro M. Flores serves as Assistant Superintendent overseeing curriculum implementation. Has dedicated Early Childhood Center. Small district SW of San Antonio. Email format likely firstname.lastname@nataliaisd.net (lana.collavo@nataliaisd.net).

title: Director of Elementary Education
notes: Superintendent Dr. L. Scott Shepherd. 11,296 students. Jamey Johnson is Director of Secondary; Leigh Kovalcik is Director of State & Federal Programs (may oversee Title I/Head Start). PreK rolls to Turner at elementary level.

title: Deputy Superintendent (Teaching & Learning)
notes: EMAIL DOMAIN MISMATCH - district public site is myfisd.com but staff use fisdk12.net for email. Tammy Bock is Coordinator of Curriculum & Student Operations. Ryan Kopp is Asst Supt of Secondary T&L. No dedicated ECE director - PreK rolls to Ambeau at Deputy level. Houston metro suburban.

title: Superintendent/Principal
notes: Very small rural district SW of Houston (Brazoria County). Superintendent serves dual role as principal. No dedicated curriculum staff. Address 1211 Mulcahy St, Damon, TX 77430.

title: Assistant Superintendent / Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: SUPERINTENDENT TRANSITION - Mason Briscoe IV named lone finalist May 2026; Robert O'Connor outgoing. Madalyn Maresh also listed as Asst Supt. Small Jackson County district. Address 601 N. Wells St, Edna TX 77957.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Federal Programs
notes: Kim Fleener is Deputy Superintendent (kfleener@cueroisd.org). Email format firstinitial+lastname@cueroisd.org confirmed (plongbotham@cueroisd.org likely). DeWitt County, mid-size rural.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Superintendent Pari Whitten. Dana Allen also serves as Assistant Superintendent. San Patricio County. Email format likely firstname.lastname@sintonisd.net or first initial + last name.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Nueces County district. Dr. Johnson has 24 years in education (18 at ECISD). No dedicated curriculum director - Teaching & Learning rolls to superintendent. Secretary Linda Lopez llopez@banqueteisd.net, CFO Adrian Pena apena@banqueteisd.net.

title: Superintendent
notes: NEW SUPERINTENDENT - Camacho named lone finalist Feb 2024, started March 2024 (replaced Richard Grill). Very small Uvalde County district. No dedicated curriculum staff. Email format likely firstname.lastname@sabinalisd.net (edgar.camacho@sabinalisd.net).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Gillespie County district. Stewart in 27th year at Harper, all in district. Previously served as District Testing and Curriculum Coordinator. Address 23122 W Hwy 290, Harper, TX.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Sabine County district (deep East Texas). Dr. Gilder named 2024 Region 7 Superintendent of the Year. Has served since Dec 2020. Sam Houston State EdD. Alt email sup@westsabineisd.net.

title: Interim Superintendent
notes: LEADERSHIP TRANSITION - Varnado is Interim (as of Aug 2025). Upshur County district (NOTE: there is also a Big Sandy ISD in Polk County with separate domain). Previously Mike Burns was Superintendent. Address 401 N Wildcat Dr, Big Sandy, TX 75755. Email format likely firstname.lastname@bigsandyisd.org or dvarnado@bigsandyisd.org.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Angelina County district. Trekell 30+ years in education, also adjunct prof at Sam Houston State. No dedicated ECE - C&I dept handles curriculum. Jill Wilson is admin contact (jwilson@huntingtonisd.com). Email format likely atrekell@huntingtonisd.com.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: WEBSITE NOTE - actual district site is fairfieldisd.net (not fairfieldisd.org). Superintendent Joe Craig. Dr. Jackson named Asst Supt July 2022 covering academics. Freestone County rural district. Email format likely firstname.lastname@fairfieldisd.net or mjackson@fairfieldisd.net.

title: Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Full-day Pre-K offered in English and Spanish (HB 3 compliant). DFW metro Ellis County district. Email format likely firstname.lastname@redoakisd.org (lynn.dockery@redoakisd.org).

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction / Director of CTE
notes: Superintendent Rachel L. Kistner. Very small Ellis County district. Tapia hired 2017, dual role covers all PreK-12 curriculum and CTE. Email format firstinitial+lastname@italyisd.org confirmed via Stafford Elementary principal Lance Bray (lbray@italyisd.org); dtapia@italyisd.org likely. Address 300 S College, Italy TX 76651.

title: Executive Director of Elementary Education
notes: RECENT PROMOTION - Grimsley moved into role 2025 (was Director of Literacy since 2023). Johnson County, fast-growing exurban DFW district. Tarleton/Lamar grad, raised in Godley. PreK rolls to her. Email format likely firstname.lastname@godleyisd.net (keri.grimsley@godleyisd.net).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Hale/Lubbock County district (~800 students). Moved to 4-day school week. Full-day PreK. Uses TEKS Resource System. Note: some sources still reference prior Supt Glen Hill but LinkedIn confirms Waldrip is current. Email format likely firstname.lastname@abernathyisd.com or first initial + last name (awaldrip@abernathyisd.com).
